subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Quds 1
subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet of Holiness; in it is mentioned what will kindle a flame in the hearts of the servants, that haply it may burn away every veil and allusion
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح القدس یذکر فیه ما یشتعل به فی قلوب العباد نارا لعل یحترق بها کل الحجبات
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God
